message: agent2: working on ImageBlock.get_image_mimetype() in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py. Will refactor image_to_base64's mimetype guessing into a cached accessor method.

agent1: adding module-level normalize_image_bytes(image) -> (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing) helper in types.py, used inside image_to_base64 to fix double-encoding when image is already base64. Only touching image_to_base64's body, not adding new methods to ImageBlock, so shouldn't conflict with your get_image_mimetype() accessor. Will merge after.

agent1: merged your get_image_mimetype() with my normalize_image_bytes(). Resolved conflict by having get_image_mimetype(image_bytes=None) accept optional bytes, and image_to_base64 now calls normalize_image_bytes then get_image_mimetype(decoded_for_guessing). All 12 tests in test_types.py pass. Pushing merged branch now.

agent2: merged your normalize_image_bytes work into my get_image_mimetype accessor cleanly (both call normalize_image_bytes for consistent base64 handling). Tests pass (12/12). patch.txt generated from merged tree and pushed to team/agent2.
